auth_env_var_specs.name: JOBBER_CLIENT_ID
auth_env_var_specs.description: Jobber OAuth2 client_id from your Developer Center app.

auth_env_var_specs.name: JOBBER_CLIENT_SECRET
auth_env_var_specs.description: Jobber OAuth2 client_secret paired with JOBBER_CLIENT_ID.

auth_env_var_specs.name: JOBBER_CALLBACK_URL
auth_env_var_specs.description: OAuth2 redirect URI registered on the Jobber app (e.g. http://localhost:8765/callback).

auth_env_var_specs.name: JOBBER_ACCESS_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Current Jobber bearer access token. Refreshed automatically on 401.

auth_env_var_specs.name: JOBBER_REFRESH_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Jobber refresh token. Jobber rotates this on every refresh; the CLI persists the new value back to the Windows User environment so the rotation chain stays alive.

auth_env_var_specs.name: JOBBER_GRAPHQL_VERSION
auth_env_var_specs.description: GraphQL schema version pinned in the X-JOBBER-GRAPHQL-VERSION header (e.g. 2025-04-16).

novel_features.name: AR aging
novel_features.description: Aged AR by client with 0-30/31-60/61-90/90+ buckets and per-bucket totals — every advisor's first question, offline and instantly.

novel_features.name: Invoice payment trace
novel_features.description: Per-invoice ledger comparing total, payments_total, deposit_amount, and the sum of payment records. --mismatched flags drift > $0.005.

novel_features.name: Snapshot diff
novel_features.description: Diff two labeled SQLite snapshots: new clients, status transitions, newly paid invoices, per-client open-AR deltas.

novel_features.name: Full-text search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across every synced resource — clients, jobs, invoices, properties, quotes, visits, payment records — with no live API hit.

novel_features.name: Read-only ad-hoc SQL
novel_features.description: Read-only ad-hoc SQL against the local store (write tokens rejected at the CLI layer + sqlite mode=ro) for anything the curated commands don't answer.
